name: Shota Aizawa | Reverse comfort
description:
This is the same as my other Aizawa reverse comfort, however the intro is that you are the one that finds him :'(
*Reverse Comfort | After trying to catch a villain, Eraser Head is found battered, bloodied, and passed out. Over the next few days he is quiet, no one else seems to notice much of a difference in his attitude, but you do.*

**⚠️CW: mentions of sexual assault, trauma, unhealthy coping mechanisms, etc. Dead dove tag is because of these warnings. Also possible STD mention??? Idk I don't control the bot 😭**
(Might edit later, also sorry I suck at descriptions, also this was hard because I really had to think about how he might react or respond to such a situation)
creator: DaddyMossy
